logoutModal.title: Log out of Cyberly?
logoutModal.description: You can safely cancel and keep learning. If you log out, your current session on this device will end.

auth.accountDetailsHint: Account details stay with your user account. Learning preferences are saved after onboarding.
auth.passwordRequirements: Password must be at least 8 characters and include a letter and a number.
auth.loginDescription: Sign in to continue your cyber wellness journey.
auth.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.displayNameRequired: Display name must be 2 to 50 characters.
auth.ageInvalid: Please enter a whole-number age from 1 to 120.

onboarding.nicknameQuestion: What should the AI call you?
onboarding.nicknameHint: This can be a nickname or alias. It is just for CyberGuard.
onboarding.educationQuestion: What education level best fits you?
onboarding.familiarityQuestion: How familiar are you with cybersecurity?
onboarding.helpTopicsQuestion: What would you like help with?
onboarding.nicknameRequired: Please enter a nickname for the AI to use.
onboarding.helpTopicsRequired: Please choose at least one topic.
onboarding.profileSaveFailed: Your account was created, but your learner profile was not saved. Please retry saving your profile before continuing.

beginner.label: Beginner
beginner.description: I'm just getting started; the basics are new to me.

intermediate.label: Intermediate
intermediate.description: I know the fundamentals and want to go deeper.

advanced.label: Advanced
advanced.description: I'm confident and looking for advanced challenges.

dashboard.profileSavedDescription: Learner preferences are saved to your profile and restored after refresh or login.

assessment.resumeDescription: Resume your saved answers and continue when ready.
assessment.pendingDescription: Complete it now or later. Adaptive recommendations remain inactive until this baseline exists.

tips.phishing: Never click links in unexpected emails or SMS. Visit the official website directly instead.
tips.password: Use a different password for every account. A password manager makes this easier.
tips.fakeNews: Before sharing news online, verify it through Sebenarnya.my, Malaysia's official fact-checking website.
tips.phoneScam: If someone claims to represent a bank or government agency, hang up and call the official number.

actions.resourcesDescription: Guides on scams, privacy and more
actions.scenariosDescription: Make safe choices in realistic situations
actions.progressDescription: View your learning statistics and topics

progress.title: Measured progress
progress.summary: {{count}} measured topics · Based on assessment results, not profile preferences.
progress.empty: Complete the initial assessment to create measured progress.

scenarios.unlockDescription: Complete the assessment to unlock scenario recommendations.

cyberGuard.title: CyberGuard AI
cyberGuard.description: Preview the chat interface. Live AI replies will use the backend AI Gateway in a later phase.

settings.displayNameRequired: Display name must be 2 to 50 characters.
settings.ageInvalid: Please enter a whole-number age from 1 to 120.
settings.nicknameRequired: Please enter a nickname for the AI to use.
settings.title: Shape your Cyberly experience
settings.description: These preferences are saved separately from your account identity. Age and education level stay separate.
settings.finishOnboardingDescription: Your account is signed in, but your learner profile is incomplete. Save this profile to continue to the dashboard.
settings.identityNote: Display name and age belong to your account information. Age is not inferred from education level, and neither is treated as learning ability.

assessment.title: Initial Cyber Wellness Assessment
assessment.introduction: A 12-question baseline check that helps future Cyberly lessons understand your measured cyber wellness level.
assessment.confirmSubmit: Submit your initial assessment? This baseline result will be preserved.
assessment.answerAll: Please answer all questions before submitting.
assessment.finalSubmissionReminder: Answer all questions before final submission.
assessment.leaveDescription: Your saved answers will remain available, and you can resume this assessment later.
assessment.resultSummary: Score {{score}}/{{maxScore}}. This measured level is based only on your answers.
assessment.noStrengthsYet: No topic crossed the strength threshold yet. That is okay; this is a starting baseline.
assessment.allTopicsMetThreshold: All topics met the current strength threshold.
assessment.measurementNote: Your self-reported familiarity stays separate from this measured result. No AI is used for questions, scoring, or feedback.

library.title: Scenario Library
library.description: Practice realistic cyber safety decisions with immediate feedback after each final choice.
library.emptyDescription: Try a different topic or difficulty filter.

scenarios.leaveDescription: Your saved decisions will remain available. You can resume this Scenario later from the Scenario Library.

intro.choiceNotice: Choices are final once submitted. Feedback appears after each decision, and scoring is calculated by the backend.

attempt.readyToCompleteDescription: All decisions are submitted. Complete the scenario to calculate your result and apply progress.

scenarios.localeFallback: This Scenario is currently shown in {{displayed}} because {{requested}} is not available yet.

hero.title: Stay Safe in the Digital World 🛡
hero.description: Cyberly is your personal cybersecurity guide — powered by AI that adapts to your level, language, and learning style.

threats.eyebrow: Did you know? — Cyber threats facing Malaysian teens right now

stats.scamVictim: of Malaysian teens have fallen victim to an online scam
stats.scamMessages: of students have received scam-related emails or SMS
stats.noWorkshop: of students never attended a scam awareness workshop
stats.dailyOnline: of Malaysian teens aged 12–17 go online every single day

why.title: Why Cyberly?
why.description: Cybersecurity education that meets you where you are.

adaptive.title: Adaptive AI
adaptive.description: Our AI adjusts explanations based on your experience level and preferred language.

skills.title: Real Skills
skills.description: Learn practical skills — spotting scams, protecting accounts, and browsing safely.

topics.title: Focused Topics
topics.description: Choose what matters to you — from online safety to cybersecurity careers.

threatOfWeek.title: AI Voice & Video Scams (Deepfakes)
threatOfWeek.description: Scammers in Malaysia are now using AI to clone the voices and faces of celebrities and family members to trick people into sending money. If you get an unexpected video call or voice message asking for money — even if it looks real — always verify through another channel before acting.

quickTopics.title: What do you want to learn today?
quickTopics.description: Pick a topic and jump straight in.

how.title: How Cyberly works
how.description: Up and running in three simple steps.

signUp.title: Sign up free
signUp.description: Create your profile in under a minute — tell us your age, language, and what you want to learn.

aiTutor.title: Meet your AI tutor
aiTutor.description: CyberGuard AI adapts to your level and chats with you in English, BM, or Chinese.

levelUp.title: Learn & level up
levelUp.description: Explore guides, beat simulations, and track your progress as your cyber skills grow.

bottomCta.title: Ready to level up your cyber skills?
bottomCta.description: Join thousands of Malaysian teens learning how to stay safe online — for free, in your language, at your pace.
bottomCta.note: No credit card needed · Available in English, BM & 中文

resources.title: Cyber Wellness Resources
resources.description: Curated guides on the cyber threats that matter most to Malaysian teens. Click any card to read the full guide.

focus.title: Recommended focus
focus.description: Showing guides for {{topic}} based on your measured assessment result.

tip.title: Pro tip
tip.prefix: Not sure where to start? Try
tip.suffix: — they are the most common threats facing Malaysian teens right now.

hero.title: Interactive Cyber Wellness Toolkit for Teens
hero.description: An AI-driven platform built to enhance cybersecurity awareness and promote safer digital behaviour among Malaysian teenagers aged 13–17.
hero.collaboration: In collaboration with Cybersecurity Hub DISS – Impact Lab

why.title: Why this matters
why.description: The cyber threat landscape facing Malaysian teenagers is serious and growing.

stats.identifyScams: of Malaysian teens say they can identify scams
stats.scamVictim: have already fallen victim to an online scam
stats.noWorkshop: of students never attended a scam awareness workshop
stats.dailyOnline: of teens aged 12–17 go online daily

built.title: What we built
built.description: A modular, AI-powered toolkit with six core capabilities.

agentic.title: Agentic AI Guidance
agentic.description: Autonomous, goal-oriented learning support with scenario-based decision assistance and real-time personalised recommendations.

chatbot.title: Cyber Wellness Chatbot
chatbot.description: Real-time conversational support that answers cybersecurity questions through natural language interaction.

adaptive.title: Adaptive Difficulty
adaptive.description: Auto-selects difficulty based on the user's knowledge and progress for a more effective lesson experience.

simulations.title: Cyber Threat Simulations
simulations.description: Simulate phishing, scams, and misinformation scenarios to sharpen critical thinking and cybersecurity decisions.

progress.title: Progress Tracking
progress.description: Monitors learning progress and engagement patterns to assess effectiveness and drive adaptive recommendations.

gamified.title: Gamified Challenges
gamified.description: Optional quizzes, achievements, and interactive activities to boost motivation, engagement, and knowledge retention.

how.title: How it works
how.description: Every experience is shaped around the individual learner.

signUp.title: You sign up
signUp.description: Complete a short onboarding profile — your age, language, familiarity, and learning goals.

path.title: AI builds your path
path.description: The Agentic AI module constructs a personalised learning path based on your responses.

learn.title: Learn your way
learn.description: Chat with CyberGuard AI, explore resources, and tackle simulations — all adapted to your level.

track.title: Track your growth
track.description: Your progress is tracked to continuously refine recommendations over time.

objectives.title: Project objectives
objectives.description: Five goals that guide everything we build.

items.toolkit: Design and develop an AI-driven Cyber Wellness Toolkit that enhances cybersecurity awareness among Malaysian teenagers aged 13–17.
items.chatbot: Create an intelligent cybersecurity chatbot for real-time conversational learning in multiple languages.
items.agentic: Build an Agentic AI module for personalised learning recommendations and adaptive difficulty adjustment.
items.gamified: Incorporate optional gamified learning areas — quizzes, simulations, and real-life cyber threat scenarios.
items.evaluate: Evaluate the system through user interaction analysis, pre/post assessments, and feedback collection.

supervisor.role: Project Supervisor · Cybersecurity Hub DISS – Impact Lab
supervisor.description: Provides guidance, professional oversight, and industry client direction throughout the project.

jayron.description: Ensures logic and webpage usability are functional, and leads implementation of Agentic AI features and adaptive learning tools.

jinHong.description: Develops the core wireframe and low-fidelity prototype design, ensuring the interface is tailored to our teenage target demographic.

edward.description: Handles backend architecture and AI workflow planning, ensuring components are streamlined for adaptive learning features.

arman.description: Builds Agentic AI analytics for personalised features and adaptive learning, focusing on user behaviour analysis.

puah.description: Leads the implementation of system architecture and the Agentic AI module, with support in chatbot functionalities.

mastery.title: Measured Mastery
mastery.description: Calculated from completed assessment topic scores, not from age, education level, or self-reported familiarity.
mastery.empty: No measured baseline yet. Complete the initial assessment to unlock progress tracking.

assessmentTopics.title: Assessment Topics
assessmentTopics.description: Topic-level mastery from your initial cyber wellness assessment.

learningTopics.title: Topics You're Learning
learningTopics.description: Based on your profile — explore guides for each one.

agent.title: CyberGuard AI
agent.welcome: Hi {{name}}! CyberGuard's chat interface is ready, but live AI replies will be enabled after the backend AI Gateway phase.

chat.title: Cyber Wellness Assistant
chat.welcome: Hi {{name}}! This chat UI is ready, but live CyberGuard replies will be enabled after the backend AI Gateway phase.
chat.disabledReply: CyberGuard chat is ready visually, but live AI replies are disabled until the backend AI Gateway phase. Your message is kept only in this page session for now.
chat.signInPrompt: Sign in to preview the CyberGuard chat interface with your session profile.
chat.aiDisabledNotice: Live CyberGuard AI responses will be enabled in a later phase. Your message is saved securely, but no assistant reply is generated yet.

page.title: AI Chatbot
page.description: Use CyberGuard AI as a focused learning companion. Live AI replies will connect during the AI Gateway phase.

history.title: Conversation history
history.emptyDescription: Start a chat and your secure account history will appear here.

generation.failedDescription: CyberGuard could not prepare a reply. Try again shortly.

migrationNotice.title: Chat history now saves to your account
migrationNotice.description: New conversations are saved securely to your Cyberly account. Older device-only chat history stays on this device and will not be uploaded or deleted.

validation.titleTooLong: Keep the title to {{max}} characters or fewer.

delete.title: Delete conversation?
delete.description: Delete “{{title}}”? This removes the conversation from your account.

empty.title: Ask CyberGuard anything
empty.description: Start with a question about scams, privacy, passwords, misinformation, or safe online choices.
empty.shortDescription: Start a conversation when you are ready.

dashboard.description: Open the full chatbot page to continue learning with CyberGuard.
dashboard.launcherDescription: Ask one question here and Cyberly will open a dedicated chat page with that new conversation.

accessibility.dashboardLauncher: Ask CyberGuard a new question from the dashboard

footer.description: Cyber wellness education for everyone · AI Gateway coming in a later phase.

admin.title: Admin Console
admin.description: Content governance, RAG governance, and AI safety management foundation.

workspace.title: Admin Console
workspace.description: Governance tools for content, RAG, and AI safety.

navigation.label: Admin sections
navigation.resourcesDescription: Review publication, approval, and CyberGuard retrieval for learning Resources.
navigation.assessmentsDescription: Assessment governance will be added later.
navigation.faqGuidanceDescription: FAQ and guidance governance will be added later.
navigation.aiAgenticDescription: Provider diagnostics, purpose routing, and Agentic safety boundaries.

accessDenied.title: Admin access required
accessDenied.description: This area is only available to Cyberly administrators.

providers.title: AI providers
providers.description: View server-side provider configuration for OpenAI, Gemini, and ILMU. Connection tests run only when an Admin clicks Test connection.
providers.notConfiguredHelp: Add the server-side API key and restart the backend before testing this provider.
providers.costNote: This test sends a small real request to the selected provider and may use provider quota.

errors.load: Unable to load AI provider diagnostics.

safety.title: Current Agentic limits
safety.noScoreChanges: No automatic score or mastery changes
safety.learnerControlled: Learners accept, modify, or ignore recommendations

resourceReview.title: Resource Review Metadata
resourceReview.description: A small governance snapshot for published resources, source quality, and future RAG readiness.
resourceReview.error: Unable to load resource review summary.

resourceGovernance.title: Resource Publishing and RAG Control
resourceGovernance.description: Search resources, review their governance state, and control whether CyberGuard can retrieve them.
resourceGovernance.summaryScope: Summary cards show all Resources. The table below follows the active filters.
resourceGovernance.savedWithRagDisabled: Resource saved. RAG readiness was automatically disabled because the resource is not published and approved.

confirmation.discardMessage: Your edits in this Resource drawer have not been saved.
confirmation.publicationMessage: Unpublishing or archiving this Resource will remove it from the learner Resource page after refresh.
confirmation.aiUseMessage: Disabling AI use will prevent CyberGuard from retrieving this Resource in new responses. Existing saved responses will not be changed.
confirmation.publicationAndAiUseMessage: This change will affect learner visibility and prevent CyberGuard from retrieving this Resource in new responses. Existing saved responses will not be changed.

table.scrollLabel: Resource governance table. Use horizontal scrolling to view all columns.

fields.ragReady: Allow CyberGuard retrieval when published and approved

publication.label: Publication readiness
publication.restoreInLifecycle: Restore from the lifecycle dialog before publishing.
publication.optionalLocaleWarning: Optional translations missing: {{locales}}. Learners using those languages may see English fallback.
publication.confirmPublishResource: Learners will be able to view this Resource. CyberGuard retrieval still requires approved review status and RAG readiness.
publication.confirmPublishScenario: Learners will be able to start this Scenario. Its scoring structure becomes learner-facing.
publication.confirmReturnToDraft: Learners will no longer see or start this item. Saved content and historical references remain.
publication.confirmOptionalFallback: Missing optional translations: {{locales}}. Learners may see English fallback.

reasons.archived: Archived content must be restored first.
reasons.resource_archived: Archived Resource must be restored first.
reasons.step_count_mismatch: Step count does not match the expected total.

errors.unpublishResource: Unable to return Resource to Draft.

resourceLifecycle.manageDescription: Review the current lifecycle state before archiving, restoring, or permanently deleting this Resource.
resourceLifecycle.archiveDescription: Learners will no longer see this Resource, and CyberGuard will no longer retrieve it. Content, metadata, and historical source records will remain so it can be reviewed later.
resourceLifecycle.restoreDescription: Restore this Resource to Draft and keep CyberGuard retrieval disabled until review is completed again.
resourceLifecycle.deleteDescription: This cannot be undone. All owned translations and metadata for this draft Resource will be deleted. Type the exact slug to confirm.
resourceLifecycle.deleteUnavailableDescription: This Resource has publication, review, RAG, or historical references. It cannot be permanently deleted; archive it instead.
resourceLifecycle.confirmSlugLabel: Type the exact slug to confirm
resourceLifecycle.archiveStillAvailable: Archive remains available for this Resource.
resourceLifecycle.restoreStillAvailable: Restore remains available for this archived Resource.

reasons.rag_documents_exist: {{count}} RAG document exists for this Resource.
reasons.rag_chunks_exist: {{count}} RAG chunk exists for this Resource.
reasons.chat_sources_exist: Saved CyberGuard responses reference this Resource.
reasons.chat_source_history_exists: This Resource appears in {{count}} saved CyberGuard response.

errors.slugMismatch: The confirmation slug does not match.
errors.notEligible: This Resource cannot be permanently deleted. Archive it instead.

resourceEditor.description: Update the learner-facing translation content for this existing Resource.
resourceEditor.previewEmpty: Main content will appear here as you type.

resourceEditor.discardSectionMessage: Your Resource content edits have not been saved.
resourceEditor.logoutMessage: Logging out will discard your unsaved Resource content edits.
resourceEditor.navigationCancelled: Navigation cancelled. Your edits are still here.
resourceEditor.bodyHint: {{count}}/{{max}} characters. Separate paragraphs with a blank line.

validation.titleTooLong: Title must be {{max}} characters or fewer.

validation.bodyTooLong: Main content must be {{max}} characters or fewer.

errors.stale: Translation changed elsewhere. Reload the latest version before saving.

resourceCreate.description: Create a safe draft Resource with English content, source metadata, and governance defaults.
resourceCreate.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. The slug cannot be changed later in this phase.

resourceCreate.invalidSourceUrl: Enter a valid http or https source URL.
resourceCreate.duplicateSlug: A Resource with this slug already exists.
resourceCreate.addMalay: Add Malay translation in the content editor.
resourceCreate.addChinese: Add Simplified Chinese translation in the content editor.
resourceCreate.reviewMetadata: Review source metadata before governance approval.
resourceCreate.reviewBeforePublishing: Review governance before publication or CyberGuard retrieval.
resourceCreate.unsavedMessage: Your new Resource form has unsaved changes.

resourceMetadata.missingSource: No clickable source URL is set.
resourceMetadata.markCheckedTodayHint: Record that an Admin manually checked this source.
resourceMetadata.replacementWarning: This Resource is flagged for source replacement. This does not automatically archive or disable it.
resourceMetadata.unsavedMessage: Your Resource metadata changes have not been saved.
resourceMetadata.unsavedLogoutMessage: Logging out will discard your unsaved Resource metadata changes.

errors.stale: Metadata changed elsewhere. Reload the latest version before saving.

resourceReview.description: Review learning resources, source metadata, and future RAG readiness.

ragKnowledge.title: RAG Knowledge
ragKnowledge.description: Future panel for approved knowledge, retrieval checks, and ingestion visibility.

contentRelationships.title: Content Relationships
contentRelationships.description: Future management for prerequisite, next-step, practice, remedial, and related-topic links.

malaysiaGuidance.title: Malaysia Guidance

roleManagement.title: Role Management

scenarioManagement.title: Scenario Management
scenarioManagement.description: Review, preview, and manage existing Cyberly scenario practice content without changing learner scores.

scenarioEditor.createDescription: Create a safe Draft Scenario. It remains hidden from learners until it is complete and published.
scenarioEditor.previewOnly: Preview only. Learners will not see this Scenario until it is published.
scenarioEditor.previewSubmissionDisabled: Learner submission is disabled in Preview mode.
scenarioEditor.previewFeedbackPlaceholder: Sample feedback appears here after a learner chooses an option.
scenarioEditor.description: Manage metadata and structured decision steps. Scoring stays controlled by the backend.
scenarioEditor.logoutDescription: You have unsaved scenario changes. Save before signing out.
scenarioEditor.attemptsLock: This scenario has learner attempts, so structural step edits are locked to preserve historical results.
scenarioEditor.savedSteps: Scenario steps saved. Published scenarios return to draft after structural edits.
scenarioEditor.structuralDraftDescription: Saving structural changes will return this Scenario to Draft and hide it from learners until it is republished.

slug.format: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and single hyphens only.

estimatedMinutes.positiveInteger: Estimated minutes must be a positive whole number.

totalSteps.positiveInteger: Total steps must be a positive whole number.
totalSteps.range: Total steps must be between 3 and 5.

scenarioEditor.slugHelp: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and single hyphens only. Example: phishing-practice-plan
scenarioEditor.missingTranslationNotice: Missing translation. Add localized text without changing the shared Scenario structure.

scenarioLifecycle.description: Review safe lifecycle actions for this Scenario. These actions do not change learner scores.
scenarioLifecycle.archiveDescription: Hide this Scenario from learners while preserving history and admin records.
scenarioLifecycle.restoreDescription: Return this archived Scenario to Draft so admins can review it again before publishing.
scenarioLifecycle.deleteDescription: Only unused Draft Scenarios can be permanently deleted. Type the exact slug to confirm.
scenarioLifecycle.deleteUnavailableDescription: This Scenario cannot be permanently deleted because it has learner or system references.

reasons.scenario_published: Published Scenarios must be archived before permanent deletion.

errors.load: Unable to load Scenario lifecycle information.
errors.dirty: Save or discard your Scenario changes before changing its lifecycle.
errors.slugMismatch: The confirmation slug must match exactly.
errors.notEligible: This Scenario is not eligible for permanent deletion.

notFound.title: Admin page not found
notFound.description: This Admin route is not available. Use the canonical Admin navigation to continue.

common.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

codes.ACCOUNT_INVALID: Please check your account details and try again.
codes.ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND: We could not find this account.
codes.ASSESSMENT_ALREADY_SUBMITTED: This assessment has already been submitted.
codes.ASSESSMENT_ATTEMPT_NOT_FOUND: We could not find this assessment attempt.
codes.ASSESSMENT_ATTEMPT_NOT_OPEN: This assessment is no longer open for answers.
codes.ASSESSMENT_INCOMPLETE: Please answer all questions before submitting.
codes.ASSESSMENT_NOT_AVAILABLE: The initial assessment is not available right now.
codes.ASSESSMENT_OPTION_INVALID: Please choose one of the available options.
codes.ASSESSMENT_QUESTION_MISMATCH: That question does not belong to this assessment.
codes.AUTH_EMAIL_ALREADY_REGISTERED: An account with this email already exists.
codes.AUTH_FORBIDDEN: You do not have access to this page.
codes.AUTH_RATE_LIMITED: Too many authentication attempts. Please try again later.
codes.AI_ASSISTANT_PERSISTENCE_FAILED: CyberGuard could not save the reply. Try again.
codes.AI_GENERATION_IN_PROGRESS: CyberGuard is already preparing a reply.
codes.AI_INVALID_RESPONSE: CyberGuard could not prepare a safe reply. Try rephrasing the question.
codes.AI_PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE: CyberGuard is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
codes.AI_RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Wait briefly before trying again.
codes.AI_TIMEOUT: The reply took too long. Try again.
codes.AI_UNSAFE_REQUEST: CyberGuard cannot help with that request, but it can explain safe and defensive alternatives.
codes.CHAT_CONVERSATION_NOT_FOUND: We could not find this chat conversation.
codes.CHAT_INVALID_ID: Please choose a valid chat conversation.
codes.CHAT_INVALID_MESSAGE: Enter a message from 1 to 4000 characters.
codes.CHAT_INVALID_TITLE: Enter a chat title from 1 to 80 characters.
codes.CHAT_MESSAGE_ROLE_INVALID: Only your messages can be sent in this phase.
codes.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again.
codes.NETWORK_UNAVAILABLE: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
codes.PROFILE_INVALID: Please check your learner profile details.
codes.PROGRESS_ASSESSMENT_NOT_FOUND: We could not find a completed initial assessment.
codes.PROGRESS_TOPIC_SCORES_UNAVAILABLE: Assessment topic scores are not available yet.
codes.RECOMMENDATION_NOT_FOUND: We could not find this recommendation.
codes.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: We could not find this resource.
codes.SCENARIO_ALREADY_COMPLETED: This scenario attempt is already completed.
codes.SCENARIO_ATTEMPT_NOT_FOUND: We could not find this scenario attempt.
codes.SCENARIO_CHOICE_FINAL: Scenario choices are final after submission.
codes.SCENARIO_DECISION_INVALID: Please choose a valid scenario decision.
codes.SCENARIO_INCOMPLETE: Please answer all scenario steps before completing.
codes.SCENARIO_NOT_FOUND: We could not find this scenario.
codes.SCENARIO_OPTION_INVALID: Please choose one of the available scenario options.
codes.SCENARIO_RESULT_NOT_FOUND: We could not find this completed scenario result.
codes.SCENARIO_STEP_MISMATCH: That step does not belong to this scenario.
codes.SCENARIO_STEP_OUT_OF_ORDER: Complete the current scenario step before moving ahead.
